title: JustFood
description: Fabric 1.20.1 - 1.20.6 | This Mod adds new Vanilla-like food
body:
This Mod adds new Vanilla-like food.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4948aa83b8e7784b74d4c164af0e174497319195.png)
There is a list of adds:
- Sweet berry jam
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f64df40eaea21407a3653fc7ec93a7c0bf509ac0.png)
- Bread with berry jam
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a78464a2c2a8367892213661968b1e738d27d7d3.png)
- Fried eggs
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61ee2e4bd1d9ef377eb3fc774c09e670e8a61dbe.png)
- Fried tropical fish
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184553897eb8009846187cbd3f8b30c3663a4840.png)
- Sea salt
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09681efaa535d3e474de91d2ebb4e4c19ba6e90.png)
- Strange soup
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f89209f10e938798621fcc314f7a7a8c29ba1ca1.png)
- Caramel
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88384ef6a9a7b4ce5833745e4afba51e707b77d2.png)!
- Apple in caramel
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28a665642e9edd63f76fe89de37775bd4f48c8c.png)
- Salted salmon
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3abfd1a9cd21966458a3e6fdac7cce61a3cb0c6.png)
- Sweet salad
  
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a37ae85256dfdc948ac26f2ff8e50372561199b.png)
